minds.title: PCB Soldering Quality
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: All PCB solder joints shall meet IPC-A-610 Class 3 acceptance criteria with zero defects escaping to final test.

type_specific_attributes.content: PCB assemblies shall achieve a first-pass yield of >= 99.5% at in-circuit test with no solder defects classified as IPC-A-610 Class 3 rejects.
type_specific_attributes.acceptance_criteria: Zero Class 3 solder defects per 10,000 joints measured over a rolling 30-day window.

minds.title: Final Assembly Torque Specification
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: All threaded fasteners in the final assembly shall be torqued to specification and verified to prevent loosening under operational vibration.

type_specific_attributes.content: All critical fasteners shall be torqued within +/-5% of nominal specification and verified via torque audit sampling at 100% for safety-critical joints.
type_specific_attributes.source: Assembly Work Instruction AWI-FA-0012 Rev C
type_specific_attributes.acceptance_criteria: Torque audit pass rate >= 99.8% with no safety-critical fastener failures.

minds.title: Solder Joint Defects
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Solder joints fail to meet acceptance criteria due to insufficient wetting, bridging, voids, or cold joints resulting from process deviations.

type_specific_attributes.mitigation_plan: Implement SPC on reflow oven profiles with automatic alerts. Perform daily first-article inspection per IPC-A-610.
type_specific_attributes.acceptable_limit: Defect rate shall not exceed 50 DPMO at in-circuit test

minds.title: Component Misplacement
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Surface-mount components placed outside acceptable positional tolerance, causing open circuits or tombstoning after reflow.

type_specific_attributes.mitigation_plan: Calibrate pick-and-place machines weekly. Use AOI after placement to catch misalignment before reflow.
type_specific_attributes.acceptable_limit: Placement accuracy within +/-0.05mm for fine-pitch components

minds.title: Torque Out of Specification
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Fasteners torqued above or below specification, leading to joint loosening under vibration or thread stripping.

type_specific_attributes.mitigation_plan: Use electronic torque wrenches with preset limits and data logging. Implement 100% torque verification on safety-critical joints.
type_specific_attributes.acceptable_limit: All fasteners within +/-5% of nominal torque specification

minds.title: Contamination in Assembly
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Foreign material contamination introduced during assembly process, causing electrical shorts, corrosion, or mechanical interference.

type_specific_attributes.mitigation_plan: Maintain ISO Class 7 cleanroom for final assembly. Implement particle count monitoring and operator gowning procedures.
type_specific_attributes.acceptable_limit: Particulate contamination below 1mg per assembly measured by gravimetric analysis

minds.title: Reflow Profile Deviation
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Reflow oven temperature profile deviates from specification, causing insufficient solder melting or excessive thermal stress on components.

type_specific_attributes.failure_mode: Peak reflow temperature deviates more than +/-5C from target profile
type_specific_attributes.effects: Cold solder joints, insufficient wetting, head-in-pillow defects on BGA packages, component thermal damage
type_specific_attributes.causes: Oven zone heater degradation, conveyor speed variation, thermocouple drift, recipe selection error
type_specific_attributes.detection_method: Inline thermal profiler with automatic pass/fail comparison to golden profile

minds.title: Solder Paste Volume Insufficient
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Solder paste deposit volume falls below minimum threshold due to stencil or printer process issues.

type_specific_attributes.failure_mode: Solder paste volume below 60% of nominal deposit volume on fine-pitch pads
type_specific_attributes.effects: Insufficient solder fillet formation, open joints, reduced joint strength and reliability
type_specific_attributes.causes: Stencil aperture clogging, squeegee pressure drift, paste viscosity change due to aging or temperature, stencil wear
type_specific_attributes.detection_method: 3D solder paste inspection (SPI) system with volume measurement on 100% of pads

minds.title: Pick-and-Place Nozzle Wear
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Vacuum nozzle on pick-and-place machine wears or becomes contaminated, causing component placement errors.

type_specific_attributes.failure_mode: Nozzle tip deformation or contamination causing vacuum leak and component drop or skew
type_specific_attributes.effects: Component misplacement, tombstoning, missing components, wrong orientation
type_specific_attributes.causes: Normal nozzle wear from repeated pick cycles, solder paste contamination, inadequate nozzle cleaning schedule
type_specific_attributes.detection_method: Post-placement AOI with component presence and orientation verification

minds.title: Feeder Misalignment
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Component tape feeder on pick-and-place machine becomes misaligned, presenting components at incorrect pickup position.

type_specific_attributes.failure_mode: Feeder pitch error exceeds 0.1mm causing off-center component pickup
type_specific_attributes.effects: Nozzle picks component off-center leading to placement offset, increased nozzle wear from asymmetric contact
type_specific_attributes.causes: Feeder rail wear, improper feeder seating, tape splice irregularity, vibration-induced feeder shift
type_specific_attributes.detection_method: Machine vision pickup position verification with automatic feeder offset compensation

minds.title: Torque Tool Calibration Drift
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Electronic torque wrench calibration drifts outside acceptable tolerance between calibration intervals.

type_specific_attributes.failure_mode: Torque wrench output deviates more than +/-3% from displayed value
type_specific_attributes.effects: Fasteners torqued outside specification without operator awareness, potential joint failure under vibration
type_specific_attributes.causes: Transducer fatigue, gear train wear, temperature effects on strain gauge, impact damage to tool
type_specific_attributes.detection_method: Monthly calibration verification against NIST-traceable reference, daily torque check on calibration fixture

minds.title: Operator Torque Technique Variation
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Operator applies torque with inconsistent technique, causing variation in achieved clamp load despite correct torque reading.

type_specific_attributes.failure_mode: Clamp load variation exceeds +/-15% due to inconsistent torque application speed and angle
type_specific_attributes.effects: Joint preload outside design intent, potential loosening under vibration or thermal cycling
type_specific_attributes.causes: Insufficient operator training, fatigue during repetitive operations, non-ergonomic tool access angle, time pressure
type_specific_attributes.detection_method: Torque-angle monitoring with electronic torque wrench, periodic operator certification audit

minds.title: Particulate Ingress from Environment
minds.creator: fmea-process@example.com
minds.description: Airborne particles or debris from the assembly environment settle on or inside the product during assembly operations.

type_specific_attributes.failure_mode: Particle count exceeds ISO Class 7 limits in assembly area during production shift
type_specific_attributes.effects: Conductive particle bridging on PCB traces, corrosion initiation sites, mechanical interference in moving parts
type_specific_attributes.causes: HVAC filter degradation, operator gowning non-compliance, material shedding from packaging, door seal failure
type_specific_attributes.detection_method: Continuous airborne particle counter with alarm threshold, visual inspection under UV light at final assembly
